title: elaphoglossum lellingeri
intro: Elaphoglossum lellingeri is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum lellingeri include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum lellingeri are typically made by infusing the dried leaves in hot water or by decocting the roots and leaves in a solvent, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
